title: fix: request the unified diff, not JSON, when fetching a PR
body: In production the action fetched the PR URL without the `.diff` suffix and with the JSON Accept header, so GitHub returned PR JSON instead of a unified diff and the model summarized garbage. Parameterize the Accept header, append `.diff` to the fetch URL, and harden HTTP-code extraction so a malformed response fails loudly instead of silently.
commit_messages: fix: missing .diff suffix, and wrong accept header, and others.
